# Application Tracking System

> AI-powered resume analysis and cover-letter generation platform built with Next.js, Stack Auth, Convex, and Google Gemini.

## Overview
Application Tracking System helps job seekers optimize their resumes and generate tailored cover letters using AI. Upload your resume, get detailed analysis, and generate professional documents.

## Key Features
- **Resume Analysis** — Upload a resume and receive AI-powered feedback on structure, keywords, and content
- **Cover Letter Generation** — Generate tailored cover letters based on resume and job description
- **Resume Builder** — Create and edit professional resumes with AI assistance
- **History & Tracking** — Keep track of all analyses and generated documents
- **LaTeX Export** — Export resumes in professional LaTeX format

## Pages
- `/` — Landing page
- `/dashboard` — Main dashboard
- `/dashboard/upload` — Upload resume
- `/dashboard/analysis` — View resume analysis
- `/dashboard/analysis/[slug]` — Specific analysis report
- `/dashboard/cover-letter` — Generate cover letters
- `/dashboard/resume-builder` — Resume builder
- `/dashboard/history` — Analysis history
- `/how-it-works` — How the platform works
- `/contact` — Contact page
- `/privacy` — Privacy policy
- `/terms` — Terms of service

## Tech Stack
- Next.js (App Router)
- Stack Auth (Authentication)
- Convex (Backend/Database)
- Google Gemini (AI)
- Tailwind CSS
